message:
feat: add OpenCode provider for SQLite-backed session discovery and conversion

Implement a new provider for OpenCode (alias: opc) that reads and writes
sessions from SQLite opencode.db databases. This completes the provider
matrix alongside Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, and Aider.

Key implementation details:
- Resolves DB path via OPENCODE_DB_PATH/OPENCODE_HOME env vars or
  config files (~/.opencode.json, XDG paths) with data.directory parsing
- Uses virtual path encoding (<db-path>/<urlencoded-session-id>) consistent
  with the Cursor and Aider provider patterns
- Reads sessions/messages/files tables from the OpenCode SQLite schema
- Extends session file extension filter to include .db and .sqlite formats
- Registers OpenCode in the provider registry with 'opc' CLI alias

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
